description.ko: 거친 햇빛 아래서 갈라진 점토의 리드미컬한 패턴과 천연 광물의 풍부하고 유기적인 색상 팔레트에 초점을 맞춘 지구 표면의 상세한 탐구입니다.
description.en: A detailed exploration of the Earth's surface, focusing on the rhythmic patterns of cracked clay and the rich, organic color palette of natural minerals under harsh sunlight.

prompt: A hyper-realistic macro photography of cracked earth texture, TERRA-1 style, intricate geometric patterns of parched clay, deep fissures, earthy ochre and sienna tones, cinematic side lighting to emphasize depth, 8k resolution, detailed mineral veins and sediment layers.
